steps.title: Distribute
steps.content: Multiply $15$ by each term inside the parentheses: $$15(x+10)=15x+150$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice B is $15x+150$, so B is correct.

steps.title: Avoid the distribution trap
steps.content: The $15$ must multiply both terms inside the parentheses. Choice A leaves the $10$ unchanged, and choices C and D use constants that do not equal $15\cdot 10$.
